scripts.text:
USE P21Play;
SET NOCOUNT ON;
DECLARE @PoNo int=6070127, @PoLineNo int=8, @PoLineUid int=387337, @LocationId int=210, @ItemId varchar(40)='11880 528SY';

SELECT
    section='oe_line_po_detail',
    order_number=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), order_number),
    line_number=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), line_number),
    po_no=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), po_no),
    po_line_number=CONVERT(nvarchar(40), po_line_number),
    quantity_on_po=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), quantity_on_po),
    completed,
    cancel_flag,
    delete_flag,
    connection_type,
    date_last_modified=CONVERT(nvarchar(30), date_last_modified, 126),
    last_maintained_by
FROM dbo.oe_line_po
WHERE po_no=@PoNo AND po_line_number=@PoLineNo;

SELECT
    section='backorder_function_type_P',
    row_count=CONVERT(nvarchar(20), COUNT(*)),
    linked_qty_sum=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), COALESCE(SUM(linked_qty),0)),
    original_linked_qty_sum=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), COALESCE(SUM(original_linked_qty),0))
FROM dbo.p21_fnt_get_linkable_transactions(@LocationId,@ItemId,@PoNo,@PoLineNo,NULL,NULL,'N',@PoLineUid,'N','N','P',CONVERT(date, GETDATE()));

SELECT
    section='oe_line_state',
    oh.order_no,
    ol.line_no,
    ol.oe_line_uid,
    ol.complete,
    qty_ordered=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), ol.qty_ordered),
    qty_allocated=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), ol.qty_allocated),
    qty_on_pick_tickets=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), ol.qty_on_pick_tickets),
    qty_invoiced=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), ol.qty_invoiced),
    qty_canceled=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), ol.qty_canceled),
    qty_staged=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), ol.qty_staged),
    date_last_modified=CONVERT(nvarchar(30), ol.date_last_modified, 126),
    ol.last_maintained_by
FROM dbo.oe_line_po AS olp
JOIN dbo.oe_hdr AS oh ON oh.order_no=olp.order_number
JOIN dbo.oe_line AS ol ON ol.order_no=olp.order_number AND ol.line_no=olp.line_number
WHERE olp.po_no=@PoNo AND olp.po_line_number=@PoLineNo;

SELECT
    section='inv_loc_state',
    qty_on_hand=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), qty_on_hand),
    qty_allocated=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), qty_allocated),
    qty_backordered=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), qty_backordered),
    order_quantity=CONVERT(nvarchar(60), order_quantity),
    date_last_modified=CONVERT(nvarchar(30), date_last_modified, 126),
    last_maintained_by
FROM dbo.inv_loc
WHERE company_id='KA' AND location_id=@LocationId AND inv_mast_uid=(SELECT inv_mast_uid FROM dbo.inv_mast WHERE item_id=@ItemId);
